narrative:
Fremont City 1-B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 681 registered voters, with 70.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
